title: Run The Critic then Architect on CommonsV2

log.context: Run The Critic then Architect on CommonsV2

Both outputs posted to Discord. Here's a summary of what was done:

**Critic (Pippi the Pitiless)** identified 10 weaknesses, ranked by severity. The top 3 that break first in production:
- No 20Hz send loop — 60 msg/sec/player will saturate the server
- LLM chat with no debounce/cancellation causes parallel in-flight races
- Unbounded `chunkCache` — guaranteed OOM on long sessions

Other notable findings: single-sample `serverTimeOffset` drift, reconciliation that corrects position but not velo...(truncated)
